hooks.command: input=$(cat); printf '%s' "$input" | jq -e '.stop_hook_active==true' >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" || exit 0; func=$(git status --porcelain -- worker public ':(exclude)public/vendor' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$func" ] && exit 0; git status --porcelain -- CHANGELOG.md 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && exit 0; printf '%s' '{"decision":"block","reason":"Functional files under worker/ or public/ changed but CHANGELOG.md was not updated. Per docs/guidelines.md, add an entry under [Unreleased] (Added/Changed/Fixed/…), written for users as a single short sentence describing what changed — no sub-clauses explaining how or implementation details, and state the change directly (name the addition/fix, not \"the app is now …\") — if this is a user-facing change. If it is purely internal (refactor, tests, docs, tooling), no entry is needed — say so briefly and stop."}'; exit 0

input=$(cat); printf '%s' "$input" | jq -e '.stop_hook_active==true' >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" || exit 0; dep=$(git status --porcelain -- package-lock.json 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$dep" ] && exit 0; git status --porcelain -- THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && exit 0; printf '%s' '{"decision":"block","reason":"Dependencies changed (package-lock.json) but THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md was not updated. Per docs/guidelines.md, keep license files in sync: update THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md and the About page (remove library versions), and verify licenses with npx license-checker. If no dependency was actually added/removed/updated, say so briefly and stop."}'; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-/nonexistent}"/*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.css|*.html) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; case "$f" in */public/vendor/*) exit 0;; esac; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; head -n 20 "$f" | grep -q "MIT License" && exit 0; printf '%s' "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"New source file $f is missing the MIT license header required by docs/guidelines.md. Add the MIT copyright block at the top (Copyright (c) 2026 Vincent Hiribarren); for .html place it right after the <!DOCTYPE html> line. Match the format already used in sibling files.\"}"; exit 0
